title: Jalopy - The Car Driving Road Trip Simulator Indie Game (公路旅行驾驶游戏)

notes:
For me the game has graphical errors, partially so massive that i can barely see anything. I can fix them with Wine D3d11, but that comes with a really massive drop in performance as trade off.
When disabling DX11/10 the game gave me an error message that it couldn't initialize it's graphics engine because DX11 is missing on my system, while minimum system requirements actually speak of DX9 so that should theoretically work fine.
On top of that the gamepad controls are badly sluggish, when releasing the analog stick it takes up to two seconds until the character stops or respectively the steering wheel returns to center. KB/mouse control was fine though.
title: Jalopy - The Car Driving Road Trip Simulator Indie Game (公路旅行驾驶游戏)

notes: Doesn't work with 4.11 because of mouse cursor issues!!!
